findings.title: Login handler emits no audit-log entry
findings.label: spec-gap
findings.claim: The spec requires an audit-log entry on every login attempt; none is emitted.
findings.detail: The adversarial verifier errored mid-refute (a tool failure), so this finding is KEPT and flagged as unverified rather than silently dropped — the degraded contract. verified is false and the review-model renders it as 'unverified-flagged'.
findings.suggestedFix: Emit an audit-log record (actor, ip, outcome) on each login attempt, success or failure.

summary: Degraded review: the adversarial VERIFY pass errored part-way, so its one finding is retained as unverified-flagged (verified:false) rather than dropped. degraded is true; recommendedEscalation is moderate (verdict 'fix').
